residue_justifications.boot/microcode.cpio: CPU microcode early-initramfs cpio retained byte-identical from the Ubuntu cloud-image base; inert under WSL, which never boots an initramfs (reviewed 2026-07-16)
residue_justifications.etc/localbench-appliance-owner.json: builder-written owner marker binding the extracted distro to the pinned runtime id (contents reviewed 2026-07-16: schema/owner/runtime_id only)
residue_justifications.home/lbworker/.bash_logout: stock Ubuntu /etc/skel bash_logout copied at lbworker user creation; verbatim upstream skeleton (contents reviewed 2026-07-16)
residue_justifications.home/lbworker/.bashrc: stock Ubuntu /etc/skel bashrc copied at lbworker user creation; verbatim upstream skeleton (contents reviewed 2026-07-16)
residue_justifications.home/lbworker/.profile: stock Ubuntu /etc/skel profile copied at lbworker user creation; verbatim upstream skeleton (contents reviewed 2026-07-16)
residue_justifications.opt/localbench/bin/localbench-worker: one-line launcher exec-ing the venv worker module (contents reviewed 2026-07-16)
residue_justifications.opt/localbench/bin/provision-appworld: one-line provision launcher exec-ing the venv worker provision entrypoint (contents reviewed 2026-07-16)
residue_justifications.root/.bashrc: stock root bashrc from the Ubuntu cloud-image base (contents reviewed 2026-07-16)
residue_justifications.root/.profile: stock root profile from the Ubuntu cloud-image base (contents reviewed 2026-07-16)
residue_justifications.usr/bin/man: ubuntu-minimal placeholder stub explaining the image is minimized (real man page content is path-excluded); shell script contents reviewed 2026-07-16
residue_justifications.usr/lib/udev/hwdb.bin: udev hardware database compiled deterministically by the systemd-hwdb trigger at package configure time; not a member of any dpkg file manifest
residue_justifications.usr/sbin/start-stop-daemon: dpkg's md5sums record does not match the binary shipped in the pinned official Ubuntu cloud-image base (known livecd-rootfs divert-and-restore build artifact; the image's diversions database shows the same machinery); genuine ELF, byte-identical across double-builds, digest-bound here (reviewed 2026-07-16)
residue_justifications.usr/sbin/grub-probe: cloud-image pseudo-grub-probe wrapper shim shipped by the Ubuntu cloud image outside dpkg manifests; shell script contents reviewed 2026-07-16
residue_justifications.usr/share/info/dir: texinfo directory index generated by install-info triggers at configure time
residue_justifications.usr/share/localbench/build-metadata.json: builder-written toolchain metadata (bubblewrap_version, python_version); contents reviewed 2026-07-16

dpkg-database-and-maintainer-metadata.reason: var/lib/dpkg itself: the status database, per-package .list/.md5sums manifests, and maintainer scripts (postinst/triggers/shlibs/symbols) - definitionally outside package file manifests; byte-identical across the reproducibility double-build and digest-bound here (prefix/extension breakdown reviewed 2026-07-16)

etc.reason: base-image and postinst-generated configuration: apparmor local includes and tunables, apt configuration, ca-certificates.conf, cloud-image build remnants, console-setup ACM tables, lock/backup files (full listing reviewed 2026-07-16)

var.reason: package-manager and postinst state: systemd catalog/preset output (89), ucf registry, pam compiled state, debconf cache, ldconfig aux-cache, apt/python hook state (prefix breakdown reviewed 2026-07-16)

wheel-unhashed-install-metadata.reason: venv scaffolding generated by python -m venv and pip outside wheel RECORDs for the locked wheelhouse install: bin console-script shims, activate scripts, pyvenv.cfg (listing reviewed 2026-07-16)
